name: zomato-restaurant-scraper
title: Zomato Restaurant Scraper - Listings, Ratings & Prices
description: Scrape public Zomato restaurant listings with names, cuisines, ratings, review counts, pricing, locality, images, and restaurant URLs. Useful for restaurant market research and local food data monitoring.

apify-actor-start.eventDescription: Charged when the run starts to cover browser startup and the residential proxy session. Number of events depends on memory (one per GB, minimum one).

restaurant-scraped.eventDescription: Charged once for each clean Zomato restaurant record saved to the dataset.
